detection_signals: High residual sugar means the wine is of excellent quality
More sweetness always means better tasting
If the residual sugar is low, the sweet wine is not properly made
why_incorrect: High residual sugar is a characteristic of sweet styles, but does not automatically indicate quality or balance. A wine with 200 g/L but low acidity may be cloyingly sweet.
misconception: High residual sugar in a sweet wine is always a sign of good quality and balanced winemaking.
corrected_understanding: Sweet wine quality depends on the balance between residual sugar, acidity, alcohol, and aromatic complexity.
